service.name: Perspective API (Google Jigsaw)
service.description_for_ai: Free content moderation API from Google. Detects toxic comments, threats, insults, profanity, identity attacks. 100+ languages. Free. Used by New York Times, Wikipedia. Use for comment moderation.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Score a comment for toxicity, threats, insults, profanity, identity attacks. Returns probability scores 0-1 for each requested attribute. Free. 100+ languages.

requestedAttributes.description: Attributes to score: {TOXICITY: {}, SEVERE_TOXICITY: {}, THREAT: {}, INSULT: {}, PROFANITY: {}, IDENTITY_ATTACK: {}, SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT: {}, FLIRTATION: {}}. Request only what you need.

doNotStore.description: Set true to prevent Google from storing the comment

agent_hints.thresholds: Common thresholds: score > 0.7 = block/reject, 0.5-0.7 = review queue, < 0.5 = allow. Adjust per your use case.
agent_hints.free: Completely free API with quota. Apply at https://perspectiveapi.com for production quota increase.
agent_hints.languages: TOXICITY works for 100+ languages. Other attributes have varying language support — check docs.
agent_hints.privacy: Set doNotStore: true for GDPR compliance. Comments with doNotStore are not used to train models.
